[{'text': "I'm at (3.54, 12.14). I can see the left edge of the map is approaching. The black wall between the corridors seems to extend to the left edge. Looking at the map, I notice the black obstacle between the two white corridors appears to have a gap on the left side. Let me try rotating south and attempting to move through.

Actually, looking at the map more carefully, I can see the black wall between the two corridors. The left side of the map shows the black wall reaching the left edge. Let me try to go south from my current position - there might be a narrow gap.

Let me rotate south and try a small move to see if there's a passage.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01GenbXgJQZrGq8NwwSzsZrp', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
